inlineContent.text: DotNfc provides a component for NFC reading which is easy to integrate into an iOS application. Supported documents are those which implement Machine Readable Travel Document (MRTD) standards as specified by International Civil Aviation Organization (ICAO).

abstract.text: Universal Machine Readable Zone object which represents the result of MRZ reading. Contains parsed MRZ of one specific travel document type.
